description_long: This is a generously proportioned, modern chaise lounge upholstered in a muted taupe-gray fabric. The design features a wide, deep seat with two loose, asymmetrically placed back cushions that provide a relaxed and inviting appearance. The armrests are broad, rounded, and seamlessly integrated into the overall form, giving the piece a soft, sculptural silhouette. The backrest is tall and gently curved, offering ample support and comfort. The upholstery is a solid, finely woven textile with a matte finish, and the base is fully enclosed, with no visible legs or feet. The overall look is plush and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A wide, plush chaise lounge with rounded armrests, deep seat, and two loose back cushions, upholstered in matte taupe-gray fabric. The design is modern and sculptural, with a fully enclosed base and soft contours.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, two loose back cushions, and the rounded, enveloping armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, curved armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tall, gently curved backrest and the seamless, fully upholstered back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rounded armrest and the plush seat profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, gently curved, and fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the chaise. It is smooth, unsegmented, and lacks any decorative tufting or buttons, contributing to a minimalist, modern look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides feature wide, rounded armrests that are fully integrated into the body of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed and upholstered, giving the appearance of a solid, grounded form.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid color with a fine, woven texture and a matte finish. There are no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose, asymmetrically placed back cushions of similar size, positioned against the backrest. The seat cushion is integrated and not separate from the main body.
